# Wire-protocol conformance fixtures

**Generated; do not edit by hand** (`make gen-fixtures` regenerates; CI
fails on drift). Recorded frame streams (`*.bin`) + `manifest.json`
describing every frame, so an SDK's frame codec in any language can be
tested with no daemon and no KVM.

The protocol itself is specified in [`docs/wire.md`](../../docs/wire.md),
including the four-step test recipe a codec test suite should implement
against these files. The streams are produced by the real Go codec
([`sdk/wire`](../../sdk/wire)) via [`gen`](gen/), and the manifest is
derived by re-decoding the generated bytes, so fixtures cannot disagree with
the implementation.
